entities.description: As a subsection of '引脚说明', this section provides a detailed definition of the pin functions and their corresponding electrical characteristics, which are essential for understanding the hardware design of the SOM-TL3588 industrial core board.
Refers to the physical connectors on the board that provide electrical connections, as described in section 2.2.
Refers to the process of specifying the function and electrical properties of each pin, as outlined in section 2.2.

relations.description: The concept of '引脚' is a primary topic of section 2.2.
The concept of '定义' is a primary topic of section 2.2.
